content: vite-plugin-pwa for offline-first SPA: use generateSW mode (default) with registerType: 'autoUpdate'. Set workbox.globPatterns: ['**/*'] and includeAssets: ['**/*'] to precache everything including public/ assets. The service worker uses CacheFirst for hashed static assets and StaleWhileRevalidate for the HTML navigation fallback (navigateFallback: 'index.html'). For a fully offline app, no runtime caching rules beyond precache are needed since all assets are bundled.
